title: Mukteshwar Temple, Punjab
tagline: Mukteshwar Temple, Punjab — spiritual town of Punjab

overview.short: Mukteshwar Mahadev Temple, also known as Mukesaran Mandir, is a shrine to Shiva and man-made cave complex located near Pathankot City, Punjab, India.
overview.description: Mukteshwar Mahadev Temple, also known as Mukesaran Mandir, is a shrine to Shiva and man-made cave complex located near Pathankot City, Punjab, India. on Shahpur Kandi Dam road. It is a Hindu temple containing representations of Ganesha, Brahma, Vishnu, Hanuman, and Parvati. It is considered to be one of the most sacred places around Pathankot.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Thara Uparla
topPlaces.description: Thara Uparla is a village in Dhar Kalan in Gurdaspur district of Punjab State, India. It is located 11 kilometres (6.8 mi) from sub district headquarter, 7 kilometres (4.3 mi) from Pathankot, 70 kilometres (43 mi) from district headquarter and 264 kilometres (164 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Thara Jhikla
topPlaces.description: Thara Jhikla is a village in Dhar Kalan in Gurdaspur district of Punjab State, India. It is located 11 kilometres (6.8 mi) from sub district headquarter, 8 kilometres (5.0 mi) from Pathankot, 60 kilometres (37 mi) from district headquarter and 259 kilometres (161 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Ranjit Sagar Dam
topPlaces.description: The Ranjit Sagar Dam, also known as the Thein Dam, is part of a hydroelectric project constructed by the Punjab Irrigation Department on the Ravi River on the border of Union Territory, Jammu and Kashmir and state Punjab. It is located upstream of the Madhopur Barrage at Madhopur.

topPlaces.name: Chamrour
topPlaces.description: Chamrour is a village in Dhar Kalan in Gurdaspur district of Punjab State, India. It is located 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) from sub district headquarter, 6 kilometres (3.7 mi) from Pathankot, 73 kilometres (45 mi) from district headquarter and 317 kilometres (197 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.description: Hardo Saran is a village in Dhar Kalan in Gurdaspur district of Punjab State, India. It is located 3 kilometres (1.9 mi) from subdistrict headquarters, 8 kilometres (5.0 mi) from Pathankot, 74 kilometres (46 mi) from district headquarters and 291 kilometres (181 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Phangota
topPlaces.description: Phangota is a village in Dhar Kalan in Pathankot district of Punjab State, India. It is located 28 kilometres (17 mi) from sub district headquarter, 59 kilometres (37 mi) from Pathankot, 72 kilometres (45 mi) from district headquarter and 287 kilometres (178 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Dhar Kalan
topPlaces.description: Dhar Kalan is a village and administrative headquarter of Dhar Kalan tehsil in Pathankot district of Punjab State, India. It is located about 30 kilometres (19 mi) from district headquarter Pathankot and 260 kilometres (160 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Tarhari
topPlaces.description: Tarhari is a village in Dhar Kalan in Pathankot district and previously was in Gurdaspur district of Punjab State, India. It is located 25 kilometres (16 mi) from sub district headquarter, 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) from Pathankot, 55 kilometres (34 mi) from district headquarter and 254 kilometres (158 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mukteshwar Temple, Punjab?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mukteshwar Temple, Punjab is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mukteshwar Temple, Punjab?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kangra Airport (Gaggal), Dharamshala (58 km) and the nearest railway station is Jammu Tawi (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mukteshwar Temple, Punjab?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mukteshwar Temple, Punjab at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mukteshwar Temple, Punjab?
faq.a: Stays in Mukteshwar Temple, Punjab start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mukteshwar Temple, Punjab?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thara Uparla, Thara Jhikla, Ranjit Sagar Dam, Chamrour, Hardo Saran.
